name: Bath Body Wrap Gray - Room Essentials™
description:
A great alternative to a bath towel, you're sure to appreciate the convenience and comfort this Bath Body Wrap from Room Essentials™ brings to your morning schedule or nighttime wind-down routine. Made from 100% terry cotton, this bath body wrap feels soft against your skin, allowing you to dry off comfortably as you take your time getting dressed. It features a hook-and-loop closure that holds it in place and lets you customize the fit, while the just over three-foot length offers plenty of coverage.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
